title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
